class BatchProcessor:
    def __init__(self):
        self.results = []

    def process_batch(self, items):
        self.results.clear()
        for item in items:
            self.results.append(transform(item))
        self.send_results()
        self.results.clear()

    def send_results(self):
        pass

class EventLog:
    def __init__(self):
        self.entries = []

    def flush(self):
        self.entries = []

def transform(item):
    return item["value"] * 2
